title: 24Pcs Pink Glitter Birthday Cupcake Toppers and Cake Decorations Picks for Party Supplies
features: ★Package/Size: Pack of 24Pcs. All our picks were assembled, Sturdy! Size: H 12.6cm * W 7.4cm/ H 5 inch * W 2.9 inch(including stick).
★Material: High quality 300g glitter cardboard with food grade toothpicks sticks.attractive and durable！

★Happy Birthday Cupcake Toppers are good for decorating cakes, desserts, cookies, donuts, table, cheese and so on, make your food look delicious, add a wonderful touch to your table, it can also be applied to creating small fruit kabobs.
★Suitable occasion: Happy Birthday Cupcake Toppers are suitable for birthday party, baby shower party, wedding party cake decoration, make your party full of movie theme atmosphere.

★Tips: Designed for single-sided,another side is plain white. This is not edible, only for decorations, please do not use it in the oven or microwave. Free return or we'll buy them back from you, no questions asked! (Our customer service comes first)
